textByHash.b86dbfec0d388a56299b3e4342710e4eceb515df: Hello I am Thormac the sorcerer.
textByHash.44f3444b66fe18e0cf3f96162d6e738f64c62371: Not right now, but thank you for offering.
textByHash.28ad02e03b49d7cc3d9b53c544c8bcab9c935157: Hello I am Thormac the sorcerer. I don't suppose you could be of assistance to me?
textByHash.6da8012d66ed40810e043556a04d9efacecf2de1: I've lost my pet scorpions. They're lesser Kharid scorpions, a very rare breed.
textByHash.b306a1eb005063901f25350b64ffe2d95d22c884: I left their cage door open, now I don't know where they've gone.
textByHash.7984597c9a554c795af2631ebcc98996346a2e59: There's three of them, and they're quick little beasties. They're all over Gielinor.
textByHash.d5d6d7d0386c0b273b44644f92581533346a71c0: Well I have a scorpion cage here which you can use to catch them in.
textByHash.924974eb2e43f8b4c63716c2762b1bc6403a012c: If you go up to the village of Seers, to the North of here, one of them will be able to tell you where the scorpions are now.
textByHash.17c173ddeeba21d17aa2b3ec2774e5ea0c0d6c43: Blast! I suppose I'll have to find someone else then.
textByHash.aaee9d4630d8cfef9af85d53aecb015c2f474408: Well remember to go speak to the Seers, North of here, if you need any help.
textByHash.bb5543d09a1b725c81eed7b44a92405cfa468c98: Aha, my little scorpions home at last!
textByHash.5c6274c59d4b1e02dd7f273e05cba1a7690f6263: Thank you for rescuing my scorpions.
textByHash.f7eaabe228136c8ca83409e92cb87fbf390d7b6d: Yes, it'll cost you 20,000 coins for the materials needed though. Which sort of staff did you want enchanting?
textByHash.0e4858e7ef96bf8b705a3f85175a97cf0af0af08: Yes, it'll cost you 30,000 coins for the materials needed though. Which sort of staff did you want enchanting?
textByHash.7067648d73110d3abfc41e50270ecfdc2195dca3: Yes, it'll cost you 40,000 coins for the materials needed though. Which sort of staff did you want enchanting?
